ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "chief_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district chief */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_categories" (
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense category */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the status (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the officer is assigned to */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the officer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the officer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "is_criminal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the incident is a criminal offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Text content of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "reporter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "reporter_type" TEXT /* Type of reporter (e.g., officer, civilian, automated system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_reporter_id FOREIGN KEY ("reporter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the media file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the media */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_media_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was left */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_incidents" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the incident occurred */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street where the incident occurred */,
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the offense */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the incident location */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was reported */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer assigned to the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text description of the resolution */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suspect involved in the historical incident (if known) */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the victim involved in the historical incident (if known) */,
  "witness_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of witness IDs (if known) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the historical incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_incidents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_incidents_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES incident_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_incidents_offense_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_category_id") REFERENCES offense_categories ("offense_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_incidents_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)
